content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass ⇒ data_tamper
P: spoof(x-user-id) → keep_401
V: authz_bypass ∧ sess_only
R: ! hdr_override ∧ ! drop_hdr
A: spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: header override and authorization bypass implies data_tamper.
Plan: spoof(x-user-id) then keep 401 behavior.
Verify: authorization bypass and verified session auth only.
Risk: high-risk header override and high-risk drop the header path.
Answer target: spoofed requests denied.
